experience.title: Marketing Manager - Food, Hot Beverages Bakery
Marketing Manager - Offer Insight
experience.description: Led a team of 3 whose remits included: digital marketing, social media management, branding and brand management, uptake and food & offer development. My main responsibility was to lead sector specific projects which delivered increased financial performance and better consumer engagement through targeted marketing. These projects included the following: 1. Created a new internal café brand, ‘Joe’s’, that was built on insight gathered from more than 1,500 consumers. Developed a bespoke annual marketing plan to provide products which surprised and delighted consumers. We grew the brand to over 50 outlets in a 12 month period and delivered 10% increase in PBIT compared to the previous offering. 2. Developed and launched a 'made in house' chilled food to go range which drove average transaction value by +8.5%, grew daily transactions by +7% and improved in unit GP% by +15%. This included creation of all marketing and promotional materials, development of pricing structure and management of the food development process (including briefing and sign off of all products in conjunction with our chef team). 3. Introduced 'FOOD@' umbrella brand to Chartwells run universities and colleges. Led a team of 4 that delivered 'FOOD@' which bought a more connected overall offer that encompassed a better digital presence, physical environment transformation, and, targeted promotions which allowed us to better connect with consumers on campus.

experience.title: Retail Marketing Manager

linkedin_profile.headline: Head of Guest Experience at Fulham Pier
linkedin_profile.about:
I am a visitor experience specialist and creative director who has launched several major attractions and location based entertainment venues. My hallmark is building successful and dynamic teams that deliver exceptional standards of service. I have overseen the entertainment and experience propositions at four major London tourist destinations and I also oversaw events and VIP experiences at Hamleys of London. In July 2022 I devised and launched Wyvernwood (TripAdvisor Travellers Choice Award Winner 2024); a 27-acre immersive adventure park in North Essex and have recently assumed the role of Head of Guest Experience at Fulham Pier; a unique new destination positioned along the River Thames.

Total Experience: 17 years and 8 months

experience.title: Performance Trainer
experience.description: The No 1 visitor attraction operator in Europe, No 2 in the world behind Disney employing 21,000 staff worldwide. Merlin currently run over 100 attractions and operate over 4 continents. In my role as a Trainer: • Responsible for training new actors to perform over 20 different character roles for up to 4000 people per day to the highest quality whilst meeting with brand specs and strict time limits. • Created and introduced a unique statistic based incentive scheme that recorded achievements and recognition across all departments, boosting team morale. • Oversaw the much-publicised move from the famous Tooley Street site to the new flagship venue in County Hall in March 2013. • Created and ran practical workshops to help actors maintain energy, motivation and physical/vocal strength, as well as helping them deal with conflict management, health & safety and customer care.

experience.title: PR Media Captain For GB And Western Europe
experience.description: Diageo is a multinational alcoholic beverages company based in London. It is the world's largest producer of spirits. As PR & Media Captain: ·The face of Captain Morgan for the 2011 re-branding and re-launch of Captain Morgan’s Spiced in UK markets and also its introduction in Belgium. ·Create exceptional experiences for celebrity and high profile clientele at major media events. ·Present YouTube broadcasts, entertaining and improvising with the public at events throughout Europe and for various UK magazines and newspapers. ·Comprehensive media training by Ogilvy PR to conform with Diageo Marketing Code. ·Attend sales conferences throughout Europe to give speeches and presentations to both Diageo employees and clients. ·Training other Captains to make regional appearances at smaller scale venues.

experience.title: Performance Team Leader
experience.description: As Performance Team Leader: • Part of the initial management team who launched this unique attraction on London’s South Bank. • Helped ensure the efficient operational running of the performance department through consistent delivery of performance, monitoring standards and giving constructive feedback and support when necessary and any other supporting administrative duties. • Maintained exceptionally high theatrical performance standards for the Performance Department, with show creation, costume standards and show specification monitoring. • Guided training and workshops. • Supported and enhanced the unique ‘visitor experience’ with show proposals and creation. • Ensured the smooth running of shows on a day to day basis by acting as the Duty Performance representative. • Engaged with actors and costume team on a daily basis, dealing with any problems, arising issues and other matters that are of relevance to the department whilst promoting honesty, integrity and professionalism. • Helped co-ordinate actor auditions on a regular basis to allow for the recruitment of talented and motivated employees.

experience.title: Experience And Entertainment Manager
experience.description: Hamleys is the oldest and largest toy shop in the world and one of the world's best-known retailers of toys. My role: • Responsible for overseeing the experience in-store for the millions of visitors to Hamleys each year by providing world class entertainment, creativity and discipline across all areas. An active ambassador of the company’s brand image. • Responsible for the delivery of all seasonal, corporate and marketing events in store to ensure that they are executed professionally at all times from conception to completion. • Providing a high level of customer experience to guests who require a personal shopper, birthday party or VIP package; including overseeing private hire for the entire venue. Aiming to maximise corporate, personal shops and party income whilst actively seeking new opportunities and ensuring the highest standards of implementation in store. • Creating and implementing all in-store theatre including Christmas at Hamleys, the launch of ‘Harry Potter at Hamleys’ and ‘Frozen II at Hamleys’ as well as various seasonal shows.

experience.title: Experiences Director
experience.description: Wyvernwood - The Enchanted Lost Kingdom, is a 27-acre outdoor immersive adventure park which launched in Alresford, Essex in the Summer of 2022. TripAdvisor Travellers Choice Award Winner 2024. My role: - Responsible for overseeing the creative development of Wyvernwood; project managing its launch and conceptualising the park’s design, guest journey and daily experiences. - Responsible for recruiting all seasonal park team-members and training them to deliver an exceptional guest experience. - Devised and implemented all entertainment and activities within the park from initial concept through to installation and launch. - Responsible for the delivery of all seasonal events onsite, including corporate events, private hires, school trips and birthday parties. - Working closely with the Managing Director and key stakeholders to achieve annual targets and KPIs. - Being a main point of contact with all third-party contractors to ensure projects are delivered on time and on budget.

experience.title: Head Of Guest Experience
experience.description: Fulham Pier is London's newest riverside destination · Positioned along the Thames and nestled by parkland, we’ve transformed this pocket of South-West London into a unique retreat. My role: • A key strategic lead in coordinating multiple service offerings; including hotel, restaurants, members club, creche, spa, conference & events, and entertainment venues. • Lead and inspire the guest experience team to deliver seamless, high-quality customer service across all touchpoints, both in-venue and via digital channels. • Championing a guest-centric culture focused on creating memorable and meaningful moments throughout the entire visitor journey. • Coordinating closely with cross-functional teams—including F&B, security, guest relations, maintenance, and events—to support the entire guest journey. • Serve as the escalation point for complex guest complaints, resolving issues effectively to maintain customer satisfaction and brand integrity. • Ensuring inclusivity and accessibility across the venue as well as via communication and booking channels. • Responsible for maintaining strong ties with the local community, BID partners and local authorities. • Maintaining operational readiness during high-pressure scenarios, including multiple event on-sales and peak guest flow periods. • Ensuring optimal presentation, cleanliness, safety, and accessibility across all areas of the venue, driving continuous improvements; identifying and mitigating service delivery risks, ensuring uninterrupted and exceptional experiences for all guests. • Monitoring and sharing guest sentiment, reviews, and feedback with all teams to drive service excellence and engagement strategies. Integrating AI and traditional tools to enhance guest engagement. • Coaching and mentoring staff to uphold the highest standards in service, communication, and operational responsiveness during complex and fast-paced situations.
